## Morgan Stanley Raises Price Target on Lam Research

Morgan Stanley PT raises on LRCX are meaningful given the firm's WFE coverage depth; improving conviction here often leads broader equipment re-ratings — relevant to NVMI positioning and the overall semi-equipment allocation.

- Morgan Stanley increased its price target on LRCX, per two outlets.
- No specific new or old target figures are disclosed in available headlines.
- High classifier confidence; the PT raise is a directional positive for the semiconductor equipment cycle outlook.
- Read alongside the group NVMI/LRCX/Teradyne up-day story, this reinforces converging positive equipment cycle sentiment.
